test_cases.name: 匿名认证
test_cases.notes: Spec sent device_id only; platform field required by auth route — used platform:ios. HTTP 201 is correct (new player on first run; 200 on repeat device_id).

test_cases.name: 云存档读取（空）
test_cases.notes: Actual route is GET /v1/save/:playerId, not /v1/save. Default save returned with beach_coins:200 and empty chapter_progress.

test_cases.name: 云存档写入
test_cases.notes: Actual route is PUT /v1/save/:playerId with client_updated_at required. Used future timestamp to avoid conflict. Data written: chapter_progress ch1 stars, currency beach_coins:210 glowstone:5.

test_cases.name: 云存档读回验证
test_cases.notes: Written data confirmed persisted: beach_coins:210, glowstone:5, chapter 1 stars [2,3,1].

test_cases.name: IAP沙盒购买
test_cases.notes: Spec used sku_id:glowstone_50 which does not exist. Actual SKUs: small_pack(60gs), medium_pack(200gs), large_pack(600gs), mega_pack(1400gs), monthly_card, starter_pack. Used small_pack as closest analog. glowstone_granted:60 confirmed in response.

spec_deviations.fix: Added platform:ios — required by auth route (VALID_PLATFORMS: ios, android, taptap)

spec_deviations.issue: Spec used /v1/save — route does not exist
spec_deviations.fix: Correct route is /v1/save/:playerId (GET for read, PUT for write)
Route uses PUT, requires client_updated_at, uses chapter_progress/currency/materials schema

spec_deviations.issue: Spec used sku_id:glowstone_50 which is not a valid SKU
spec_deviations.fix: Valid SKUs are: small_pack, medium_pack, large_pack, mega_pack, monthly_card, starter_pack. Used small_pack (grants 60 glowstone)
